critical_news.title: Federal Reserve Signals Rate Cut in July 2026
critical_news.description: Fed Chair confirmed dovish pivot with expectations for 25bp rate cut at July FOMC meeting amid cooling inflation readings.

trading_pause_recommendation.reasoning: High FX volatility expected post-announcement with rapid repricing of USD weakness across major pairs

critical_news.title: European Central Bank Unexpected Hawkish Stance Shift
critical_news.description: ECB President indicated willingness to maintain rates higher for longer due to sticky core inflation in eurozone services sector.

trading_pause_recommendation.reasoning: Diverging monetary policy paths between Fed and ECB creates sharp EUR movement and cross-pair volatility

medium_impact_news.title: China Manufacturing PMI Exceeds Expectations
medium_impact_news.description: Caixin Manufacturing PMI came in at 52.3 vs expected 51.5, indicating stronger than anticipated industrial activity.
medium_impact_news.recommendation: Monitor for follow-up moves but contained to Asia-Pacific session impact

medium_impact_news.title: UK Employment Data Deteriorates Unexpectedly
medium_impact_news.description: UK jobless rate ticked up to 4.2% from 4.0%, adding pressure to BoE's rate-cut narrative.
medium_impact_news.recommendation: Potential GBP weakness continuation, traders watch for BoE forward guidance signals

medium_impact_news.title: Tesla Earnings Beat Expectations by 15%
medium_impact_news.description: Tesla reported Q1 2026 EPS of $1.08 vs consensus $0.94, driven by margin expansion in new Berlin factory.
medium_impact_news.recommendation: Sector rotation into EV stocks, watch for outperformance vs tech indices

low_impact_news.title: Japan Core CPI Remains Stable at 2.1%
low_impact_news.description: Japanese core inflation unchanged month-over-month, supporting BoJ's accommodative stance.
low_impact_news.recommendation: Background noise, minimal trading impact expected

low_impact_news.title: Oil Inventories Rise Less Than Expected
low_impact_news.description: US crude inventories increased by 2.1M barrels vs expected 3.2M, providing mild bullish signal.
low_impact_news.recommendation: Modest support for energy prices, not expected to significantly impact broader FX markets

immediate_pauses_required.instrument_group: Major FX Pairs (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY crosses)
immediate_pauses_required.window: 14:00-14:45 UTC (Fed announcement) and 14:45-15:25 UTC (ECB ripple effects)
immediate_pauses_required.reason: Dual central bank divergence triggering extreme volatility and potential flash moves
Fed dovish signal likely to trigger algorithm-driven selling initially before bid in on longer duration assets

instruments_safe_to_trade: Government Bonds (benefit from rate cut expectations)

risk_assessment.volatility_index_prediction: VIX likely to spike to 18-22 range
risk_assessment.tail_risk_events: Potential flash crash in illiquid pairs during thin Asia-US overlap
risk_assessment.hedging_recommendations: Consider tightening stops on all open positions; avoid adding risk during announcement windows
